Name: Deposit
Definition: The permanent addition of items to the collection, where the transfer of ownership is conditional on certain requirements or restrictions, but without financial payment or reciprocal transfer of items.

Name: Donation
Definition: The permanent addition of items to the collection through the transfer of ownership, without financial payment.

Name: Purchase
Definition: The permanent addition of items to the collection through the transfer of ownership, accompanied by one or more financial payments.

Name: Loan
Definition: The temporary addition of items to the collection with no transfer of ownership, without financial payment.

Name: License
Definition: The temporary addition of items to the collection with no transfer of ownership, accompanied by one or more financial payments.

Name: Item Creation
Definition: The permanent addition of items to the collection as a result of item creation by the owner of the collection.
